Fixed in batch 2 (single-snapshot ops + ProjectId reuse on reload + reference-safe eviction). Build clean, 58 tests (3 new exercising reload). Subagent review wf_1ddb1b0f-ca2: 0 confirmed / 4 refuted.

Fixed in batch 2 (single-snapshot ops + ProjectId reuse on reload + reference-safe eviction). Build clean, 58 tests (3 new exercising reload). Subagent review wf_1ddb1b0f-ca2: 0 confirmed / 4 refuted.

Fixed in batch 3: watcher threads WatcherChangeTypes + tracks known dirs (seed + learned ancestors); directory renames/deletes escalate to a detect-all sweep. 3-round review (8->3->0 confirmed) caught + fixed dotted-dir misclassification and OneDrive-placeholder false exclusion. 68 tests.
Fixed in batch 3: _sync lock + _disposed flag; timer disposed under the lock; ArmDebounce/Flush guarded. Verified across review rounds.

Fixed in batch 3: WorkspacePaths.EscapesViaReparsePoint walks target+ancestors; source_context/refresh/scanner skip symlinks/junctions via LinkTarget (attribute-bit-gated for perf), NOT the ReparsePoint bit (so OneDrive/cloud placeholders stay indexed). Real junction test. Reviewed over 3 rounds.

Fixed in batch 3: _disposed flag + tracked _startTask; Start won't publish/watch after dispose; Dispose waits pump+start and only disposes store if both finished; watcher disposed again post-start to close the race-created leak.

Fixed in batch 4: search_text grades each line precise (all whole tokens, phrase>scattered) vs partial (token-covering); silent first-token fallback deleted; matchKind + counts + filesMatchedAcrossLines + partials mode. Design validated by Opus+GPT-5.5 as customers. Whole-token (not substring) grading after round-1 review caught Order/OrderId mislabel. 76 tests. Reviews wf_499d0e20-caf (7->addressed), wf_6fe8d8cc-2db (0).

Fixed in batch 4: implementations fallback + related_tests report confidence 'heuristic'; context_pack/impact tag embedded relatedTests heuristic; capabilities advertise heuristic; docs/Descriptions updated. Verified by review.
Already fixed in batch 2: LoadedProjectId was removed entirely; semantic ops now look the owning project up by name in the pinned Solution snapshot, never touching _loaded outside the gate.

Shipped in 268ce46: pathGlob/excludePath/namespace filters on search_symbol; AppendPathFilter shared with search_text; 2 adversarial review rounds; 83/83 green. Follow-ups remain: -6t8 (o09b firstPartyOnly + repo_overview excludes), -mff (o09c references/find_file propagation).

Shipped in 5a435a1 (GitInfo/GitWatcher/IndexManager wiring, indexed_commit tracking, repo_overview git block; adversarial review + fixes). Residual hardening tracked separately: -avb, -wll, -h99, -4qz.
Shipped in b075ef8: definition(includeBody:true) returns primary-declaration source inline; 4 review rounds; 94/94 green.
Shipped in b075ef8: search_text hits carry best-effort containingSymbol via InnermostSymbolAt.
Shipped in b075ef8: GitInfo.ResolveGitExe returns null (not bare 'git') when unresolved; Run short-circuits, GitAvailable=false — closes the reintroduced cwd-search spawn.
Shipped in b075ef8: git-refresh-design.md header now says Implemented; GitRefresh->GitInfo.

Shipped in b075ef8: search_symbol next-step hint + meta.confidenceNote (indexed-vs-exact) + server_capabilities.confidenceModel meanings. Remaining piece (noise:true flag on third-party paths) needs vendor-root detection and rides with o09b (-6t8).

Shipped in b075ef8: outline partialFiles (+truncation marker) and source_context truncation budget hint. The endLine-includes-closing-brace note is a documented cosmetic (endLine is the real end line; not a code change).

Shipped in Batch 7: search_symbol/search_text firstPartyOnly (complete, scan-free, any-depth via VendorExcludeGlobs — matches the per-hit noise flag exactly); per-hit noise:true on hits under a vendored/generated dir (IsVendorPath); repo_overview.suggestedExcludes (complete SQL segment-prefilter of vendor dirs actually present). 2 review rounds (3 LOW fixed, re-verify clean); 104/104 green.

Shipped in Batch 7: excludePath on find_file and search_text; pathGlob+excludePath on references (a path filter runs the indexed candidate path so counts reflect the filter, surfaced via partialReason). AppendPathFilter generalized to a list of excludes; FindFiles/ReferenceCandidates/TextFilter threaded. 2 review rounds; 104/104 green.

Fixed: idx:N handle now carries an FNV-1a identity fingerprint (idx:N~fp over name/kind/startLine/path, SOH-delimited). ResolveSymbolIdHandle recomputes it from the resolved row and returns 'stale_handle' when a rowid the delta refresh reused now holds a different symbol, instead of silently resolving to the wrong one. Cross-file reuse always detected (path in fp); bare idx:N still resolves best-effort. Independent adversarial review: no reachable defects. 113/113 green.

Shipped in Batch 9: implementations ranks concrete (instantiable) leaves before abstract scaffolding; each impl carries its derivation path (via = base that introduces the interface, null when direct/not-pinpointable); concreteCount + likelyImplementation flag the single-concrete case with a hint. Semantic/exact path only — heuristic base-list path stays unranked pending abstract/sealed modifiers in the index (-bt7). Emerged from the dispatch-map discussion, narrowed from a Castle/DI resolver to honest hierarchy-based ranking. Adversarial review clean (one via:null best-effort note refuted). 114/114 green.

Fixed in Batch 10: SyntaxIndexer defaults interface members (and interface-nested types/delegates) to public via a threaded memberDefault; class/struct/record members stay private; explicit modifiers still win. Needs reindex — schema_version bumped to 2 with an auto-rebuild-on-open trigger. Adversarial review + re-verify clean. 119/119 green.
Fixed in Batch 10: ParamSig keeps ref/out/in/params/this parameter modifiers in stored signatures (the overload disambiguator). Needs reindex (schema_version 2). 119/119 green.

Fixed in Batch 11: ImplementationsAsync seeds the semantic scan-set with the projects that syntactically implement the type (ImplementationCandidates base-list match -> owning projects), so FindImplementations loads them and returns exact. The tool now falls through to the index base-list implementers when semantic resolves but finds none, instead of returning empty; partialReason is honest (candidate_cluster_bounded only when coverage actually bounded, else no_semantic_implementers); each impl carries rank concrete|abstract. Adversarial review: 2 MEDIUM + 2 LOW found and fixed (position-mode empty-name match-all garbage; dishonest partialReason), re-verified clean. 121/121 green. Caveat: validated by reasoning + invariant test, not against the reporting ExactTarget repo.

Fixed: type_hierarchy now shares the implementations honest-fallback pattern. When compiler-exact DerivedOrImplementing is empty (type-twin identity mismatch or bounded coverage), it surfaces the index base-list implementers (derivedConfidence:heuristic) + partialReason + the twin note, keeping baseTypes/interfaces/symbol exact — instead of a bare exact []. Member-position guarded (TypeHierarchyAsync returns null for members + an isType check). Also refined the implementations member-skip partialReason to member_fallback_type_scoped (policy, not the misleading semantic_timeout) with semanticReason as context. Independent re-verify clean. 123/123 green.

Fixed: implementations member-mode now scopes the fallback to the declaring type's syntactic implementers and returns the SAME-named member in each (partialReason member_scoped_syntactic, confidence heuristic), instead of the honest-but-empty response. Keyed on (namespace, type name) so an unrelated same-simple-named type can't masquerade as an implementer's member. Falls back to the honest empty + recovery note when nothing scopes. Independent review: core matching sound, no blocking defect; cross-namespace false-positive fixed; nested-implementer/500-cap edges degrade safely to honest-empty. 123/123 green. Positive path validated by reasoning + deploy (fixture semantic resolves members, so the fallback branch can't fire under test).

Shipped as commit 868bf8c, additive-only. Per-hit orphaned:true flag on search_symbol + repo_overview.orphanedFiles count. The compiledOnly FILTER from this bead's original scope was deliberately DROPPED: adversarial review (w43ueejmm) confirmed the no-compile_items signal is over-inclusive (legacy wildcard <Compile>, shared .shproj/.projitems, Directory.Build props/targets globs, and repo-root projects all leave genuinely-compiled files without a compile_items row), so a hard filter would silently bury LIVE code. Signal is flag-not-filter; all wording hedged best-effort/one-directional; the inverted failed-parse doc was corrected (failed parse MASKS a subtree, not orphans it); characterization test pins a known false positive. Build clean, 125 tests green, two-agent re-verify PASS.

Fixed in commit 3cb463a. nextCursor now computed inside the WithListBudget build closure as offset+items.Count (the count actually returned), so a byte-budget shrink that drops the page tail no longer skips those hits. End-to-end test forces a real shrink through search_text and asserts the walk covers every hit (verified 60->9 fail on bug reintroduction). Two adversarial reviews: code CLEAN.

Fixed in commit 3cb463a. search_symbol auto-mode cursor now carries the resolved match mode (o:<offset>:<mode>); Page() parses it and later pages continue that mode instead of re-running the exact->prefix->substring ladder from a non-zero offset (which returned an empty page). Non-vacuous regression test. Reviewer PASS.

Fixed in commit f524f18. AppendPathFilter now handles a leading '**/' (any depth INCLUDING zero) by matching the remainder both at root and at any depth, on BOTH include and exclude sides. Reviewer confirmed no over-match/regression and caught the symmetric exclude-side gap (now fixed). Tests: root file appears in '**/*.cs'; root gen/ dropped by '**/gen/**'.

Fixed in commit f524f18. refresh_index normalizes backslash paths to the stored forward-slash form before RequestRefresh. Watcher and git-reconcile paths were already normalized; the tool was the only gap. Test reintroduction-verified (dup row 27->28 without the fix).

Fixed in commit 90c3843. references now honors includeGenerated on BOTH paths: indexed via ReferenceCandidates 'AND f.is_generated=0' (counts + samples), semantic via ReferencesAsync skipping reference locations in GeneratedPaths() before counting/sampling. Adversarial review PASS (path-format match verified, removed tool-side filter proven redundant, no field leaks generated). Test reintroduction-verified (false=2 true=2 without the fix).

Not an indexing overload-cluster drop (original hypothesis was wrong). Root cause per owner: search_symbol('Create') surfaced many 3rd-party 'Create' instances that buried the real InterfaceBase.Create. Resolved by the existing vendor-noise controls (firstPartyOnly / excludePath / repo_overview.suggestedExcludes, Batch 7) to drop 3rd-party hits, plus the pagination fixes (e2q/cli, commit 3cb463a) so a real hit on a later page is no longer skipped. Confirmed working in the field.

Shipped as commit 9ad1479. search_text regex:true — .NET regex over indexed content, FTS-pre-narrowed by whole-token required literals (else bounded scan), per-match ReDoS timeout + per-line wall-clock budget, pattern-length cap, honors pathGlob/project/scope/lang/generated, same hit shape as token mode. Three adversarial reviews all FAILed then fixed: two literal-extraction false-negative holes (\B, pattern-edges/^/$), two ReDoS holes (between-files-only budget, unbounded pattern length), and silently-ignored project/scope. Soundness reintroduction-verified. 157 tests green.

Shipped in a077f64. First-page zero-hit runs one bounded unscoped probe: 'elsewhere' redirect with samplePaths (widen/relax-filters note), co-occurrence redirect for tokens never on one line, provable index-wide absent message, generated-only -> includeGenerated hint, token-free-query guard. Review-hardened wording (probe attribution; no over-claims); reintroduction-verified (3 tests fail with the probe disabled).

Shipped in a077f64. Regex responses report filesTotal (TRUE in-scope candidate count — COUNT deliberately uncapped after review caught the bm25-window false-full-coverage case) + budgetHit only-when-true + a PARTIAL-coverage note with the scanned-X-of-N numbers.
Shipped in a077f64. narrowedOn reports the whole-token literals FTS narrowed on (omitted on a full scan).

Shipped in a077f64. LINE-BASED (multi-line patterns match NOTHING) stated in the regex param description and the zero-hit note. No multiline flag (agent said they would not use it; honest doc was the ask).

Shipped in a077f64. ReDoS regression tests added — and immediately valuable: (a+)+$ is LINEAR on modern .NET (auto-atomicity rewrites it), so the catastrophic case uses (a|aa)+$ (alternation-headed loop the optimizer cannot atomicize). Per-line budget check proven to fire mid-file (needed a 100k-line bait; 5k lines scan in under 1ms).

Completed in a077f64. Cardinality warning: >=1000 precise lines -> 'Common term — scope with pathGlob or add tokens' (glob-aware wording). The widen-hint half shipped via oec; owning-symbol span had already shipped as containingSymbol.

Shipped in a077f64. The verbatim per-call note is gone on both token and regex paths — notes are contextual only (redirect/absent/co-occur/partial-leads/common-term/coverage/timeout) and omitted on clean success; the semantics live in the tool description, read once.

Shipped (see commit above). didYouMean token-variant probe: split (Mode4 -> 'Mode 4') and whitespace-agnostic join ('Mode 4' -> Mode4) forms probed on every zero-precise first page (dead-end, co-occur, partial-leads branches — review showed the join direction was starved on total-dead-end-only gating). Suggestion only, never substituted; counts hedged; generated-only caveat. Reintroduction-verified.

Shipped (see commit above). search_symbol empty name (or '*') + namespace/pathGlob enumerates the scope (matchMode 'enumerate', kind-filterable, paged, duplicate-free across pages); empty name without a scope is an explicit bad_request instead of the silent [] the field agent hit.

Shipped (commit above, v0.4.0). Exact-path references are usage-kind classified (call/construction/typeMention/attribute/nameof/xmldoc/usingDirective/baseList/typeof/other) with a kinds breakdown, per-sample kind, a validated usageKinds filter honored in counts, and publicConsumersOnly anchored on the declaring assembly. Indexed fallback says the filters were not applied. Review FAILed 3 defects (position-mode inversion, silent-empty on typo'd kinds, ctor-initializer/implicit-new gaps) — all fixed and test-pinned.

Fixed in 20cd3a8: InsertSymbols/InsertFile use INSERT..RETURNING id — one statement per row (was two; ~1.14M -> ~570k steps per big build). RETURNING verified on the bundled SQLite 3.49.1; error surface identical; no triggers in schema. Cold build 46.7 -> 43.3s at 1200 projects.

Fixed in 20cd3a8: LocateTokenLineSpans — single-pass whole-token scan, no Split('\n') (was ~2x every candidate file's allocation, up to 2000 files/references call); snippets substring lazily for samples only. Review proved parity on a dozen adversarial inputs AND caught a reachable infinite loop for names containing a newline (references(name:'\nGuard') — FTS does not reject it); guarded + hang-guard test.

Fixed in 20cd3a8: containingSymbol decoration batched — InnermostSymbolsAt runs one grouped query per ~40 (path,line) keys instead of one point query per hit (~100/page); in-memory tie-break mirrors the point query's ORDER BY exactly; review caught an Ordinal/IgnoreCase mismatch (case-twin paths on case-sensitive FS), fixed.

Fixed in 20cd3a8: ProjectGraph depth-1 SQL fast path (indexed WHERE per direction; UNION ALL downstream-then-upstream for 'both' preserving BFS order under truncation; unknown direction returns [] like the BFS — review caught the catch-all returning the full graph). Cluster load no longer loads the entire edge table once per project. references HOT 652 -> 420-510ms.

Fixed in 20cd3a8: the warm-cache fingerprint check batches into ONE grouped query per EnsureLoadedAsync (was a point query per loaded project on every semantic call). Review caught GROUP BY collation mismatch vs the single query (case-variant names -> permanent reload loop, repro'd) — GROUP BY p.name COLLATE NOCASE + parity test. The 2x EnsureLoaded / 2x resolve per references call is retained by design (name-first resolution + single-snapshot honesty, bead 797).

Fixed in 20cd3a8: added .cs attributed incrementally (O(1), mirrors CompileItemResolver exactly) in PURE-SDK workspaces; any legacy project forces the full rebuild (review-repro'd permanent ownership loss on legacy delete->re-add via stash/branch flows). RefreshProjectData sources csproj/sln lists from the files table — no full disk walk on csproj touches in ANY workspace. Targeted refresh paths now apply the scanner's excluded-dir rule (phantom-project fix). 4 parity tests.

Fixed in 20cd3a8: managed-heap backstop in EvictBeyondCap — past 3GB the effective cap halves (floor 8), preserving the never-evict-kept/referenced invariant; logs only when the tightened cap drives an eviction. GC.GetTotalMemory(false) is a non-collecting microsecond read.

Shipped (commit above; schema v3 -> one auto-reindex on deploy). Compile graph now expands <Compile Include> globs (+Exclude=), honors unconditioned project-level <Compile Remove> for default ownership, and EnableDefaultCompileItems; Conditions ignored (over-inclusion). ResolveSemanticTarget never targets an uncompiled declaration and searches WITH generated files (the WSDL live twin carries an auto-generated banner). Flagship dead-twin test resolves at exact, reintroduction-verified both ways. Validate on the monolith: implementations(IPartnerFrameworkInterface) should return the 8 implementers at exact confidence after the reindex.
Shipped (commit above, v0.5.0). confidenceNote emitted ONLY for heuristic confidence; the indexed explainer is gone from per-response meta (tier meanings live in server_capabilities.confidenceModel).

Shipped (commit above). meta.statusNote explains refreshing ('background non-blocking refresh — results reflect the index as of lastRefreshUtc') and stale ('watcher changes pending (N)'); omitted when ready. Unit-tested for all three states.
Shipped (commit above). meta.build stamps every response with version+shortsha (~20 bytes) via BuildInfo.Stamp — the inline deploy check the field asked for.

Fixed in f795c61 (hotfix). Root cause: synchronous ReadToEnd BEFORE WaitForExit made the timeout unreachable; on fsmonitor/Scalar-style monoliths git spawns a daemon that inherits the redirected stdout pipe so EOF never arrives even after rev-parse exits. Fix: dedicated reader threads + WaitForExit(timeout) first + bounded drain grace (degrade to null, never hang) + kill process tree + stdin closed (protects the MCP stdio channel) + '-c core.fsmonitor=false' and GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS=0 on every invocation. Field shape reproduced in a regression test (grandchild holds inherited pipe ~20s; runner returns in ~1.5s).

Subsumed by 3tz (field-confirmed): the orphaned flag is now accurate for Include/Remove shapes, so same-name twins self-disambiguate — the dead copy carries orphaned:true, the live (often generated) copy does not. No separate disambiguation signal needed.

Field-verified fixed by 3tz (compile-graph fidelity), not by twin aggregation: Compile Include glob expansion + Compile Remove honoring mark the dead WSDL twin orphaned, and the semantic resolution gate (search includeGenerated:true, prefer non-orphaned declarations) resolves the LIVE twin - so FindImplementations runs against the declaration implementers actually reference. User confirmed implementations works correctly on the monolith (2026-07-09: 'it0 has been fixed, this was fixed with looking at compile include/remove, we verified that is working fine'). The documentationCommentId-aggregation approach described in this bead was never needed.

Batch 25, review CLEAN. h99: ResolveGitExeFrom accepts git.cmd/git.bat (PATHEXT-order within a dir); Invocation() spawns wrappers via cmd /d /s /c with outer-quote handling (spaces/parens verified); exit-code+stderr propagation and kill-tree through the cmd layer review-verified; IndexManager logs when git is unresolved instead of silently disabling git-aware refresh. Hardening from review: IsHexCommit gates HeadCommitEx output and ChangedFiles interpolands so the cmd-interpreted args tail is enforced shell-inert, not assumed. wll: top-level watch gained NotifyFilters.DirectoryName (a FileName-only filter never reports the logs/ dir birth - found by the test); OnEvent late-attaches the logs/HEAD reflog watch when .git/logs is created by the first commit and fires the debounce; Dispose/attach interleavings review-verified safe. E2E: commit-less repo's first commit advances indexed_commit (git 2.51.2 does NOT pre-create logs/ at init, so the e2e genuinely exercises the re-attach).

Batch 26, review round 2 CLEAN. Root cause (user-confirmed): multi-staged build consumes ET.Api.Generated via <Reference Include>+HintPath from a common output folder - no ProjectReference, no graph edge, so references' dependents-closure candidate discovery pruned implementer projects (0 refs, coverage 1/1) and even seeded implementations bound the interface to the dll's METADATA symbol. Fix: AssemblyRefEdges recovers <Reference>-to-in-workspace-project edges into project_refs (AssemblyName-keyed, ambiguous names skipped, packages/bin/obj HintPaths rejected as external, failed-parse projects excluded from the name map; schema v5); SemanticWorkspace wires the recovered edge as a ProjectReference and skips the hint dll for WIRED names (source-over-binary); cycle guard (review HIGH: mutual refs + fingerprint reload wired an accepted ProjectReference cycle that deadlocked GetCompilationAsync forever) via reachability BFS over AllProjectReferences - the filtered ProjectReferences view hides dangling refs exactly during the reload window. Field-shaped e2e (real versioned dll in Common/) passes at exact for both implementations and references; reintroduction-verified every half. meta.indexSchema rider + stale note rewrites included. Version 0.7.0.

Batch 27, review CLEAN (zero findings; 348M-snapshot concurrency hammer, lifecycle/failure-path probes, timing-test headroom measured). Minimum cut shipped exactly as the field designed: index.progress {phase: scanning|parsing_projects|indexing_files|finalizing, filesIndexed (monotonic), filesTotal (once the scan fixes it, never fabricated), elapsedMs} in server_capabilities.index AND inside every index_building error body; absent when ready; refreshes never show a cold-build bar; no ETA/percent per the honesty spec (0tn tracks honest ETA). Bonus: the stderr build log now prints count/total/percent/elapsed every 8000 files. Version 0.7.1.
